user.title: TCL Lyon
user.description: Connect to data.grandlyon.com. You need a GrandLyon Connect account AND a separate data password set via the [forgot-password flow]({forgot_password_url}).

stop.title: Find a stop
stop.description: Type part of a stop name (e.g. "Bellecour").

line.title: Find a line
line.description: Which lines do you want to follow at {stop_name}? Type part of a line name or number (e.g. "T2", "C3", "27").

reauth_confirm.title: Re-enter your data password
reauth_confirm.description: The data password for {username} was rejected. Enter it again — remember it is set via the [forgot-password flow]({forgot_password_url}) and is distinct from your SSO password.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Did you set your data password via the forgot-password flow? It's distinct from your SSO password.
error.no_results: No match found. Try a different search.
